core_pe_net_cash.formula: target = core_eps x target_core_pe + net_cash_per_share; core_eps = eps_forward - ati_per_share; net_cash = cash + STI - total_debt

fcff.capex_formula_note: CAPEX displayed as positive outflow; formula: FCFF = NOPAT + D&A - CAPEX - ΔNWC

net_debt_bridge.formula: net_debt = total_debt - cash - short_term_investments; equity_value = EV - net_debt - minority_interest + non_operating_assets

ev_ebitda.formula: Price = (EBITDA × Multiple − Net Debt − Minority Interest + Non-op Assets) / Shares × 1000
